name: field-switch
visual_summary: The field-switch component is a toggle button that allows users to switch between two or more states. It is typically used when a user needs to make a binary choice or switch between two different settings. This component is suitable for any scenario where a user needs to toggle between two options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-switch
Description: The field-switch component is a toggle button that allows users to switch between two or more states. It is typically used when a user needs to make a binary choice or switch between two different settings. This component is suitable for any scenario where a user needs to toggle between two options.
Style: default, material-design
Interactions: clickable, toggle
Tags: toggle, button, binary-choice

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
